prompt:
MAISON VOGUE PARIS — luxury claymation fashion cover editorial

A poised claymation girl in a perfectly sculpted tweed clay suit with tiny gold buttons, carrying a structured clay handbag, while a fluffy baby poodle puppy made of coiled white clay curls trots elegantly beside her. Color palette of classic black, warm camel, cream, and polished gold clay hardware. A miniature iconic clay tote bag with a gold chain strap and tiny embossed clay monogram swings from her wrist. Set inside a grand claymation Parisian hotel lobby featuring rounded marble columns, ornate clay chandeliers dripping with tiny crystal beads, and a luxurious red clay carpet.

Charming old-money elegance, playfully luxurious mood, claymation Vogue fashion editorial aesthetic, boutique toy-like world with exquisite handcrafted clay craftsmanship. Poodle fur sculpted from hundreds of tiny rolled clay coils, visible clay tool marks and handcrafted textures across the tweed fabric, handbag, and architectural details. Warm amber studio lighting, soft cinematic shadows, Wallace & Gromit meets high-fashion couture, premium stop-motion aesthetic, ultra-detailed clay textures, shallow depth of field, magazine-cover composition, photorealistic claymation rendering, 8K quality.
